note: SOURCE OF TRUTH for subagent model assignment (operator directive 2026-07-14). Each value is an ordered PRIMARY->FALLBACK chain: use the first model; fall back to the next only if the first is unavailable. Fable is a PREMIUM tier and MUST NEVER be reached by inherit/default — only by explicit pin. agents/*.md frontmatter pins the PRIMARY (chain[0]); the fallback is a documented preference (the Agent frontmatter model: field holds a single value). Enforced by hooks/model-pin-gate.sh (PreToolUse Task|Agent) + a harness-doctor check that every agents/*.md carries model: and names a model in this file. See doctrine/model-selection.md.

spawn_default.note: For a raw Agent/Task spawn whose subagent_type has no entry above, the gate BLOCKS and requires an explicit model — it never silently inherits. There is deliberately NO catch-all default that could hide an un-triaged category.

ungate_able_paths.note: These spawn surfaces expose no model field a PreToolUse hook can inspect/block — covered by doctrine convention + lint ONLY, not a hard gate (honest residual, not overclaimed).
paths: workstreams-ui reconciler headless-local (--model only if spawnModel set)
